channel.title: Posts on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Lough on Data

item.title: Giving Your LLM Context
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Working through RAG approaches — from the dummy-simple Ollama + AnythingLLM path to a GCP RAG Engine setup that lives next to your IDE.

item.title: Lazy Graph RAG
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A first pass at LazyGraphRAG — defer all LLM calls until query time, build a concept graph from NLP, and chase the cost/quality sweet spot.

item.title: Data Saturday #52 — Oslo
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Session notes from Data Saturday #52 in Oslo: tools that came up, Roche’s Maxim, testing in the dev cycle, data mesh, and turning data into influence.

item.title: Never Make Another dbt model .yml
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A GitHub Action that runs dbt-osmosis + dbt2looker on every push, then commits the regenerated .yml and .lookml files back to your repo.

item.title: Data Vault walk-through: Fifty First Data Vaults
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A talk to the UK Data Vault User Group on what went wrong (and right) across many iterations of building data vaults, and why the methodology is worth the heartache.

item.title: Building a Wedding Photo Collection Website with Ruby on Rails
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A step-by-step Rails build for a wedding photo collection site — Active Storage on AWS S3, deployed to Heroku, custom domain via GoDaddy.

item.title: dlt Demo: Bird Hotspot Finder, pt. II
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Extending the dlt pipeline: stage load packages to S3, persist schema changes back to DuckDB, and ping Slack on schema drift.

item.title: World Wide Data Vault Consortium 2023
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A recap of WWDVC 2023 in Stowe, Vermont — small, international, and surprisingly star-studded for a methodology most people still haven’t heard of.

item.title: dlt Demo: Bird Hotspot Finder, pt. I
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Loading eBird API data into DuckDB with dlt, then querying it in DBeaver. A first look at dlt as a Meltano/Airbyte alternative.

item.title: Creating a Mermaid Diagram for Your dbt Project Using graph.gpickle
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Turn a dbt project’s compiled graph.gpickle into a Mermaid diagram so you can actually see what your models depend on.

item.title: Creating a Data Pipeline Between PostgreSQL and Snowflake with Meltano
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Standing up a Meltano pipeline from a PostgreSQL source to a Snowflake destination — init, plugins, env config, run.
